item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested warranty field as another local patch, identifies the repeated pattern of adding controls to email/table/checklist/page after each missed item, moves the issue upstream to a unified inquiry information contract and completeness gate, and avoids supplying any field copy, placement, or implementation step."}
